day name: Transfer of the Holy Relics of the First-martyr and Archdeacon Stephen
name: Stephen
troparia: (Tone 4) O martyr Stephen, your head was crowned with a kingly crown* on account of all the struggles you endured for Christ our God.* You beheld the vision of your Saviour seated at the right hand of God.* Do not cease to intercede with Him for the salvation of our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 6) You were the first to be sown on the earth by the heavenly Husbandman,* O most laudable Stephen,* and you were the first on earth to shed your blood for Christ, O blessed one;* you were the first to be crowned with the wreath of victory in the heavens,** O first among athletes, crown-bearer, first among martyrs.
